title: Magex's Better Ender Dragon
description: Makes the Ender Dragon feel more inline with modern-vanilla
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bf9695509635cfa7650760365e579f7cc06d3a6.png)



# About
Take your final battle to the next level with **Magex’s Better Ender Dragon!** This pack gives the iconic End boss a complete visual overhaul — featuring **glowing textures, enhanced wings**, and a **modern design** that fits perfectly with Minecraft’s **newer mob styles**. Face the **Ender Dragon like never before!**



# Features
- Changes the texture of the Ender Dragon
- Changes the model of the Ender Dragon (optifine)
- Changes the model of the Dragon Egg

# Requirements
![REQUIREMENTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5565ec4f08401f848919a99ff1872b81d89e19d4.png)
